summary: Researched PatternKey feature extraction. All 5 features fully defined in Lean (modalDepth, temporalDepth, impCount, complexity, topOperator). Python PatternKey dataclass already exists in schema/records.py. Need to implement extract_pattern_key(formula_json) function in a new features.py module. GoalCategory has 8 values matching VALID_TOP_OPERATORS. Neural network encoding: 4 numeric features + one-hot(8) for topOperator = 12-dim vector.

artifacts.summary: Full algorithm specification for PatternKey feature extraction, GoalCategory enum details, formula JSON traversal, tensor encoding design, and placement recommendations.
